meta.description: PBP Voice Matrix — strictly typed phrase libraries per Constitution §PBP

decisive.text: {winner} explodes off the shikirisen!
A thunderous tachiai — {leader} wins the hit!
{leader} blasts forward and takes the initiative!
What a collision! {leader} drives straight through!
{leader} catches {trailer} flat-footed — dominant charge!
The tachiai is all {leader}! Complete domination at the start!
{leader} with a textbook tachiai — low and fast!
BANG! {leader} fires out like a cannonball!
{leader} gets the jump — immediately on the front foot!
A devastating opening! {leader} hammers into {trailer}!
{leader} with the better timing — straight into the chest!
The crowd erupts as {leader} wins the initial clash!
{leader} launches like a bullet train at the tachiai!
Perfect form from {leader} — head low, hips driving!
{leader} catches {trailer} high and pushes through!
A clean tachiai win for {leader} — total authority!
{trailer} stumbles back from the force of {leader}'s charge!
{leader} comes in low and hard — {trailer} is rocked!
That tachiai had venom! {leader} seizes the initiative!
{leader} wins the mental game — first to move, first to strike!
Explosive! {leader}'s tachiai sends {trailer} reeling!
{leader} gets under {trailer}'s chin — a brutal opening!
That's a championship-caliber tachiai from {leader}!
{leader} reads the timing perfectly and strikes first!
A ferocious charge from {leader}! {trailer} is instantly on defense!
{leader} puts everything into that first hit!
The impact echoes through the arena — {leader} takes command!
{leader} drives forward with conviction from the very first step!
No hesitation from {leader} — a decisive opening blast!
{leader} absolutely crushes the tachiai!
The power difference shows immediately — {leader} bulldozes ahead!
{leader} times the charge perfectly — {trailer} never had a chance!
A masterful opening — {leader} controls every inch!
{leader} surges forward with frightening intensity!
You can feel the arena shake — {leader} wins the opening exchange!
{leader} with an aggressive, low tachiai — textbook!
What a start! {leader} leaves no doubt from the opening!
{leader} charges with the force of a freight train!
The tachiai tells the story — {leader} is on a mission today!
{leader} overwhelms {trailer} with pure forward momentum!
Right from the start, {leader} dictates the pace!
{leader} comes out swinging — an emphatic tachiai!
Boom! {leader}'s tachiai is on another level today!
{leader} gets the better of the opening collision by a mile!
A picture-perfect charge from {leader}!
{leader}'s tachiai is so strong, {trailer} visibly buckles!
The first impact belongs to {leader} — completely dominant!
{leader} detonates at the shikirisen!
A rocket start from {leader}! The crowd is on its feet!
{leader}'s tachiai cuts through {trailer}'s defenses instantly!
Like a cannon shot, {leader} obliterates the space at the tachiai!
{leader} hits like a runaway freight train right on the shikirisen!
A frightening display of raw tachiai power from {leader}!
No hesitation—{leader} launches forward with absolute malice!
The impact echoes through the Kokugikan! {leader} wins the charge cleanly.
{leader} dictates terms immediately with a bone-jarring tachiai!
A picture-perfect charge! {leader} leaves no room to breathe.
The sheer violence of {leader}'s tachiai sends shockwaves through the arena!
{leader} unleashes a devastating burst of speed off the line!
Total commitment at the tachiai from {leader}—a massive hit!

even.text: They collide — neither gives an inch!
Solid contact at the tachiai, straight into a battle!
A hard charge from both men — dead even!
Mutual respect at the tachiai — both come in strong!
The opening clash produces a stalemate!
Neither man backs down — they crash together at the center!
An honest collision — both wrestlers are fully committed!
The tachiai is a draw — heads collide, neither yields!
Both men fire out with equal intensity!
A bruising exchange at the tachiai — no clear winner yet!
Simultaneous impact — the battle is on!
They meet head-to-head with tremendous force!
A spirited tachiai from both — this could go either way!
Dead even! The real fight starts now!
Both men charge with purpose — neither flinches!
A fair exchange at the start — it's anyone's bout!
They crash together in the middle — no advantage gained!
Chest to chest after the tachiai — a test of wills begins!
Hard contact from both sides — we have a fight on our hands!
The opening is neutral — both men looking to impose their style!
A measured tachiai from both wrestlers — evenly matched!
Neither wrestler wins the initial charge!
The collision at the center yields nothing — both hold firm!
They come together with a crack — both hold their ground!
A balanced opening — the chess match begins!
Both men absorb the impact and settle in for battle!
A symmetric charge — the opening reveals no weakness!
They lock horns at the center — neither gives ground!
Simultaneous fire — the tachiai is perfectly matched!
No advantage to either side — a true contest from the start!
Both men dig in after a level tachiai!
They neutralize each other at the start!
The opening exchange is all square!
A competitive tachiai — both wrestlers mean business!
Equal force meets equal resolve at the shikirisen!
Head-on collision! The tachiai settles nothing!
They trade power at the opening and cancel each other out!
A brave charge from both — the battle is fully joined!
The tachiai ends in a standoff — pure determination from both!
Shoulder to shoulder after impact — neither budges!
An explosive but even tachiai!
Both men arrive at the same moment — a clash of titans!
The opening is contested — no quarter given by either side!
They collide and immediately begin jockeying for position!
No half measures from either man — it's war from the start!
A furious tachiai ends in a draw!
Both charge with full commitment but neither breaks through!
The tachiai is razor-tight — both men land their hits!
They absorb each other's charge and reset in the center!
A solid, workmanlike tachiai from both rikishi!

slow.text: A cautious tachiai… feeling for position.
No wild rush — they meet and measure each other.
A deliberate start — both men testing the waters.
A tentative opening — neither commits fully.
They ease into it, hands probing for a hold.
A soft tachiai — more craft than crash.
Neither man shows urgency at the start.
A patient opening — the real battle hasn't begun yet.
They circle warily after a muted tachiai.
The crowd murmurs — a quiet start to this one.
Feeling-out process at the tachiai — no big hits yet.
A gentle start that belies the tension in the air.
Both men seem to be holding something back.
A thinking man's tachiai — deliberate and measured.
The opening is conservative — waiting for an opening.
Neither wrestler presses the issue at the start.
They meet softly and begin the tactical dance.
A cagey start — both wary of overcommitting.
The tachiai barely registers — it's all about positioning now.
Low energy at the tachiai… but the tension is palpable.
A restrained tachiai — strategy over power today.
They touch hands and immediately look for angles.
A quiet opening — the storm may come later.
Both wrestlers choose patience over aggression.
A calculating start from both sides.
The tachiai is almost polite — but don't be fooled.
Neither man rushes in — experience speaks.
A measured approach at the start — respect between these two.
They come together gently, feeling for weakness.
A slow burn from the tachiai — the bout simmers.
Hands out, searching — a technical opening.
A false start of energy — then restraint from both.
The tachiai is almost meditative.
They ease together like old rivals who know each other well.
No fireworks at the start — just careful positioning.
A tactical tachiai — brains over brawn.
The opening is quiet — the crowd leans in.
Both men showing caution — perhaps wary of injury.
A considered start — no wasted energy.
They glide into contact rather than crash.
A stealthy tachiai — the danger is hidden.
Neither charges — they drift together and probe.
The crowd waits for action after a quiet tachiai.
A chess-like opening — all about the first grip.
More feint than force at the initial contact.
They begin at half-speed — sizing each other up.
A subdued tachiai, but the eyes tell the story.
Patience on display — neither man overcommits.
The tachiai is a whisper — the shout will come.
Both men let the tachiai develop slowly and deliberately.

grip_gain.text: {leader} gets a hand on the mawashi!
Grip secured — {leader} wants yotsu!
{leader} finds the belt and settles in.
{leader} snatches a deep left-hand grip!
There it is — {leader} has the mawashi!
{leader} locks onto the belt — this is dangerous!
A strong grip from {leader} — the belt battle is won!
{leader} fights inside and finds the fabric!
{leader} snakes a hand in — right-hand grip established!
Belt secured! {leader} is in prime yotsu position!
{leader} wrestles the grip away from {trailer}!
A patient hand finds the belt — {leader} takes control!
{leader} powers through and grabs the mawashi!
The grip fight goes to {leader} — an outside hold!
{leader} digs deep for that inside grip!
A crafty hand from {leader} secures the position!
{leader} has the preferred grip — advantage established!
Double-handed grip for {leader}! This is serious!
{leader} muscles into a deep belt hold!
{leader} finally gets the grip — it's been coming!
Belt contact! {leader} has what they wanted!
{leader} latches on and won't let go!
A technical masterclass — {leader} works to the belt!
{leader} threads the arm through for a solid grip!
The mawashi is {leader}'s — now the throw is possible!
{leader} with an overarm grip — controlling the pace!
A decisive moment — {leader} wins the grip battle!
{leader} reaches around and finds the belt at the back!
Iron grip from {leader} — {trailer} is stuck!
{leader} secures a shallow grip — enough to work with!
The hand finds home — {leader} on the belt!
{leader} pries open {trailer}'s defense for the grip!
A contested grip fight ends in {leader}'s favor!
{leader} catches the mawashi mid-scramble!
There's the left-hand grip {leader} has been hunting for!
{leader} wrenches the arm in for an inside position!
A veteran move — {leader} takes the grip without force!
{leader} slides the hand down to the mawashi — textbook!
Belt work from {leader} — this is their arena!
{leader} with a quick hand finds the mawashi knot!
A subtle shift gives {leader} the grip advantage!
{leader} works through the arms and onto the belt!
The grip is locked — {leader} won't surrender it!
{leader} traps {trailer}'s arm and takes the mawashi!
A beautiful transition to belt grip from {leader}!
{leader} uses hip pressure to force the grip!
{leader}'s persistence pays off — belt contact!
After a long fight, {leader} secures the grip!
{leader} reaches across for a cross-body grip!
The mawashi belongs to {leader} now!

grip_break.text: {trailer} breaks the grip — back to the center!
The hands come free — a reset in close quarters!
{trailer} shakes loose! The grip is gone!
A desperate break from {trailer} — survival instinct!
{trailer} twists away and frees the belt!
The grip snaps free — {trailer} escapes!
{trailer} peels {leader}'s hand off the mawashi!
A violent wrench breaks the hold!
{trailer} uses hip rotation to break the grip!
The belt slips through {leader}'s fingers!
{trailer} fights free of the dangerous grip!
Grip broken! The bout resets!
{trailer} powers out of the hold!
A skillful break — {trailer} denies the belt!
{trailer} swats away {leader}'s grip attempt!
The mawashi grip is stripped away!
{trailer} refuses to let {leader} settle on the belt!
A timely break from {trailer} — back to neutral!
{trailer} uses elbows to pry loose!
The grip is denied — {trailer} scrambles free!
{trailer} squirms away just in time!
Impressive defense — {trailer} breaks the dangerous hold!
{trailer} jerks free with a sudden burst!
No belt for {leader} — {trailer} pulls the hand away!
{trailer} circles away and breaks the grip!
A clean break — both men back to square one!
{trailer} chops down on {leader}'s wrist — grip broken!
The belt battle is reset after {trailer}'s escape!
{trailer} finds a gap and slithers free!
A stubborn defense from {trailer} breaks the hold!
{trailer} bats the hand away with authority!
The grip is released under {trailer}'s pressure!
{trailer} pushes {leader}'s arm out — no more belt!
With a twist, {trailer} frees the mawashi!
{trailer}'s mobility breaks the clinch!
A crucial grip break from {trailer}!
{trailer} shrugs off the hold like it's nothing!
The grip dissolves in the scramble!
{trailer} slides the hips back and the grip fails!
An explosive break from {trailer} — {leader} left grasping air!
{trailer} uses core strength to break free!
The belt escapes {leader}'s hand in the chaos!
{trailer} spins and the grip is broken!
A defiant break from {trailer} — the fight continues!
{trailer} clamps down on {leader}'s wrist and tears it free!
No luck for {leader} — the grip is denied again!
{trailer} drops the hips and the grip snaps!
A smart defensive move — {trailer} neutralizes the grip!
The hold is undone — both men free in the center!
{trailer} bulldozes through to break the clinch!

oshi_pressure.text: {leader} pours on the tsuppari!
Heavy thrusts from {leader} — driving {trailer} back!
{leader} keeps the chest up and shoves forward!
Rapid-fire tsuppari from {leader}! {trailer} is battered!
{leader} hammers away at {trailer}'s upper body!
Thrust after thrust — {leader} is relentless!
{leader} drives with open palms — pure oshi power!
The shoves keep coming — {trailer} can't find a grip!
{leader}'s oshi attack is withering!
A nodowa from {leader} — hand on the throat!
{leader} fires off a barrage of thrusts!
Push after push — {leader} won't let up!
{leader} targets the chest with powerful thrusts!
The tsuppari from {leader} are landing clean!
{leader} uses palm strikes to keep {trailer} upright and off-balance!

{leader} extends the arms and creates space!
The pushing attack from {leader} is overwhelming!
{leader} shoves {trailer} toward the edge!
Harite! {leader} slaps then thrusts!
{leader} rains down blows on {trailer}'s defense!
A sustained pushing attack from {leader}!
{leader} keeps {trailer} at arm's length with oshi!

{leader} bulls forward with raw pushing power!

{leader}'s palms are pistoning into {trailer}'s chest!
The oshi barrage continues — {trailer} is retreating!
{leader} finds the throat and pushes upward!

{leader} won't let {trailer} settle into yotsu!
Push, push, push — {leader} is a machine!

{leader} attacks with both hands — {trailer} is overwhelmed!

{leader}'s pushing attack backs {trailer} up step by step!

{leader} maintains distance with sharp thrusts!
The tsuppari fly like drumbeats — {leader} is in rhythm!
{leader} hits {trailer} with a two-handed shove!
Powerful oshi from {leader} — this is their bread and butter!
{leader} keeps the pressure high with constant thrusting!
A slap then a shove — {leader}'s combo is effective!

The oshi attack has {trailer} stumbling backward!
{leader} channels everything into forward pressure!

scramble.text: No grip — just brute force and footwork!
A frantic scramble in the middle!

Both men grappling wildly — no one has control!
A chaotic exchange in the center of the ring!
Arms tangled — neither can establish position!
A messy scramble — both searching for any advantage!
They wrestle in close quarters without clear advantage!
Hands slipping, bodies colliding — pure chaos!

The action is frenzied — all technique abandoned!
A tangle of arms in the middle — who will emerge?
They jostle and shove in a formless clinch!
Neither man can impose order on this fight!
A scrappy exchange — elbows, forearms, and willpower!
Both wrestlers are fighting for any kind of position!
The bout descends into a physical chess match!
An undignified scramble — but effective!
Heads together, hands flailing — it's a war of attrition!
Pure scrapping in the center — this is a dogfight!

They battle for hand position in a tight scramble!
A rough-and-tumble exchange in close quarters!
The grip fight is going nowhere — both men stall!
Arms entangled — a stalemate in the making!
Both wrestlers refuse to yield any position!
A scramble of bodies — technique gives way to grit!
They push and pull in a tug-of-war for the center!

Neither can settle — the scramble continues!

The clinch is all muscle and determination!
Arms locked, heads pressed — a grinding battle!
They churn in the center without resolution!
A raw, unscripted exchange between two fighters!
The scramble is exhausting just to watch!
Both men gasping as they fight for position!
The center of the ring is a battlefield!
Neither wrestler budges — a brutal stalemate!
They twist and writhe — searching for any edge!
A wrestling match in the truest sense!
The scramble tests endurance as much as skill!
Back and forth in the clinch — evenly matched!
An arm-wrestling contest in the ring!
The crowd watches breathlessly as they grapple!
A messy, wonderful, exhausting battle!
Neither man can gain the upper hand in this scramble!
